sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint references tau_id, tau_runner_up, delta_id, tau_dest, and tau_seeded but does not name the threshold source.
decisionTaken: Froze route-selected thresholds in telephony-verification-thresholds-189.v1 and published 189_verification_threshold_matrix.csv.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Route sensitivity deterministically chooses thresholds and every decision carries the threshold profile ref and concrete lower-bound values used.
operationalRisk: Synthetic seed thresholds may be conservative until live adjudication improves calibration.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Publish a new threshold version and require validator updates; do not silently edit v1 thresholds.
